summary: Iteration 36: Frontend-only testing of i18n translations and UX improvements. Language switching between EN/AR/UR/HI works correctly. Dashboard and navigation items translate properly. However, ShiftReportPage and BulkSalaryPayment components have incomplete translations - many labels are hardcoded English strings instead of using t() function.

ui_bugs.issue: Card labels and table headers are hardcoded in English instead of using t() translation function. Lines 234, 248, 260, 270, 281, 291, 299, 310, 348, 370-388
Component imports useLanguage but doesn't destructure t() function. All text labels are hardcoded English strings

passed_tests: Dashboard loads correctly with all widgets
Language dropdown works (data-testid='language-dropdown')
Language switching EN->AR: Dashboard title translates to 'لوحة القيادة'
Language switching EN->AR: Dashboard subtitle translates to 'نظرة عامة على الأعمال'
Language switching EN->AR: Total Sales translates to 'إجمالي المبيعات'
Language switching EN->AR: Widget customization dialog labels translate correctly
Language switching EN->HI: Works for Hindi translations
Language switching EN->UR: Works for Urdu translations
RTL layout applies correctly for Arabic and Urdu
Mobile responsiveness - language dropdown visible in mobile header
Mobile responsiveness - Shift Report page elements visible on mobile viewport
Shift Report page title translates to 'تقرير الوردية اليومي' in Arabic
Shift Report tabs translate: 'التقرير اليومي' and 'نطاق التاريخ'
Widget customization dialog - 8 widgets available
Widget names translate correctly in Arabic
Loading skeleton exists in ShiftReportPage (animate-pulse class present)
Shift Report loads with Daily Report and Date Range tabs
Shift Report shows summary cards: Total Shifts, Total Sales, Opening Cash, Closing Cash, Expected Cash, Cash Difference
Shift Report shows Payment Method Breakdown chart
Shift Report shows Sales by Branch chart
Shift Report shows Shift Details table with data
action_items: ShiftReportPage.jsx: Replace hardcoded English labels with t() translations - Total Shifts should be t('total_shifts'), Total Sales should be t('total_sales'), etc.
ShiftReportPage.jsx: Translate table headers - Cashier, Branch, Time, Duration, Opening, Expected, Closing, Difference, Sales, Status
ShiftReportPage.jsx: Translate chart titles - 'Payment Method Breakdown' to t('payment_breakdown'), 'Sales by Branch' to t('sales_by_branch')
BulkSalaryPayment.jsx: Add 't' to useLanguage destructuring: const { t } = useLanguage()
BulkSalaryPayment.jsx: Replace all hardcoded labels with t() calls using existing translation keys (bulk_salary_title, preview_select, etc.)
critical_code_review_comments: ShiftReportPage.jsx has t() imported via useLanguage but only uses it for title and tabs, not for card labels or table headers
BulkSalaryPayment.jsx imports useLanguage but doesn't destructure t from it, so all labels remain in English
Translation keys exist in i18n.js but are not being used in these components
Good: Loading skeleton implementation in ShiftReportPage works correctly
Good: RTL layout switching works correctly for Arabic and Urdu

success_rate.frontend: 75% - Core functionality works, but translation coverage incomplete

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 36 tested i18n translations and UX. Language switching works (EN/AR/UR/HI) but ShiftReportPage.jsx and BulkSalaryPayment.jsx have incomplete translations - many labels hardcoded in English. Translation keys exist in i18n.js but t() function not called in these components. RTL layout and mobile responsiveness work correctly. Loading skeleton exists in ShiftReportPage.
